final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: interior-design-visualization
Asset type: architectural visualization, lifestyle scene
Primary request: a serene Chinese tea room in neo-Chinese (新中式) style designed for quiet contemplation and tea tasting
Scene/backdrop: minimalist tea room with floor-to-ceiling window revealing bamboo shadows swaying outside, calligraphy scroll hanging on wall, bonsai tree on wooden stand
Subject: natural wood tea table with purple clay teapot and tea cups arranged for service
Style/medium: architectural photography, zen interior design
Composition/framing: wide interior shot, eye-level perspective, balanced composition with tea table in foreground and scroll/bonsai in background
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight filtering through bamboo, warm ambient interior lighting, tranquil and meditative atmosphere
Color palette: warm natural wood tones, earthy clay browns, muted greens from bamboo and bonsai, ink black calligraphy accents
Materials/textures: smooth polished wood grain, matte ceramic teaware, rough textured scroll paper, glossy bonsai leaves
Text (verbatim): "新中式"
Constraints: maintain authentic Chinese tea culture aesthetic, ensure bamboo shadows visible through window, keep scene uncluttered
Avoid: cluttered furniture, bright saturated colors, modern plastic materials, western decor elements, harsh artificial lighting
